cells.rationale: Foundational fail-loud config schema and new CLI verbs with descriptor-tree registration and byte-identical absent-file fallback — a contract whose wrong abstraction propagates to every downstream task.
Bounded single-surface descriptor field applied at argv-build time, but the native-vs-keeper-effort precedence risk warrants opus over sonnet's literalism.
Bounded in-memory catalog augmentation with a named merge point, though the fail-loud collision semantics and widened name regex touching every validation site keep it on opus.
Cross-island loader plus new render bindings under strictVariables with a byte-identical-fallback contract — a wrong abstraction breaks the compiled binary and every render gate.

The hardest task: a novel delegate-adjudicate-commit contract with detached launch, attacker-influenced foreign JSON, failure maps, and byte-faithful native extraction — high blast radius and security-shaped.

Bounded selection-brief extension with fail-loud guidance enforcement, but authoring capability-only guidance that must not leak cost/provider ordering into a content-blind selector needs opus judgment.
Closed-union extension threading through reconcile-core, the autopilot producer, and dispatch with delicate degrade-not-fatalExit and sticky/retry semantics — contract-touching daemon work.
Slow-tier e2e proving the full novel pipe plus consolidating docs — bounded and convention-following, but the worktree-anchored orchestration and loud-skip discipline are intelligence-sensitive.
